Impacts Database¶

Impact databases manages importing (set_data()) and retrieval (get_data_entry()) of LCA data.

Specialized databases, ElectricityImpactsDatabase, EOLImpactsDatabase, and TranportationModeImpactsDatabase, are inherited from the base class ImpactsDatabase to account for additional classifiers present in those databases (e.g., region and technology type used in ElectricityImpactsDatabase).

class pod_lca.impacts.ImpactsDatabase¶

Database manager maintains the impact database.

name¶

Name of the database.

Type:

str

primary_key¶

Primary key organizing the database.

Type:

str

unit_key¶

Data header corresponding to the units of the database entries.

Type:

str

qty_key¶

Data header corresponding to the quantity of the database entries.

Type:

str

data¶

Impact data, with following headings; - primary_key (str): Name of the impact. - qty_key (str): Impacts per unit of measure. - unit_key (str): The unit of measure. - impact category (float): Quantity of impact.

Type:

pandas.DataFrame

classmethod new(name)¶

Create a new database.

Parameters:

  • name (str) -- Name of the database.

  • file_path (str) -- Location of the impact categories json file.

Returns:

Database created.

Return type:

ImpactsDatabase

set_name(name)¶

Set the name of the database.

Parameters:

name (str) -- Name of the database.

set_data(file_path, **kwargs)¶

Set the database data.

Parameters:

  • file_path (str) -- Location of the CSV file.

  • impact_headers_map (dict) -- The headers of the CSV file as they would be mapped to the impacts in the database: {header (str): impact category (str)}.

  • emission_headers_map (dict) -- The headers of the CSV file as they would be mapped to the emission inventories in the database: {header (str): inventory (str)}.

  • carbon_storage_headers_map (dict) -- The headers of the CSV file as they would be mapped to the carbon storage in the database: {header (str): carbon storage (str)}.

  • grouped_data (str) -- Prefix used in the grouped data.

  • density_headers (str) -- Headers corresponding to density value, and the units respectively.

  • additional_headers (list of str) -- Headers of the columns to be imported, other than name, unit, and impact categories.

  • multipliers (list of float) -- Values of each column of the CSV will be multiplied by these values, in the order given in impact headers first and then additional headers.

Raises:

KeyError -- Category not recognized.

set_data_entry(flow, qty, unit, **kwargs)¶

Add a custom entry the database.

Parameters:

  • flow (str) -- Name of the impact.

  • qty (float) -- Quantity of the flow.

  • unit (str) -- Unit of measurement for which the impacts are applied.

  • impacts (dict) -- Dictionary of impacts {impact catergory (str): impact (float)}.

  • emissions (dict) -- Dictionary of emissions {emission inventory (str): emission (float)}.

  • carbon_storage (dict) -- Dictionary of carbon storage {carbon storage (str): carbon quantity (float)}.

  • additional_data (dict) -- Dictionary of additional data {header (str): value (str / float/ int)}.

Raises:

KeyError -- Category not recognized.

set_primary_key(key)¶

Set primary key of the database.

Parameters:

key (str) -- Primary key organizing the database.

set_unit_key(key)¶

Set unit key of the database.

Parameters:

key (str) -- Data header corresponding to the units of the database entries.

set_qty_key(key)¶

Set quantity key of the database.

Parameters:

key (str) -- Data header corresponding to the quantity of the database entries.

get_name()¶

Get the name of the database.

Returns:

Name of the database.

Return type:

str

get_impact_category_units()¶

Get the units of the impact categories.

Returns:

List of units of the impact categories.

Return type:

list of str

get_data_all()¶

Retrieve impact data in the database.

Returns:

Impact data.

Return type:

pandas.DataFrame

get_data_entry(flow_name, header=None)¶

Retrieve impacts for given flow.

Parameters:

  • flow_name (str) -- Name of the flow.

  • header (str) -- Name of the header. If None, the full data row is returned.

Returns:

Databse entry corresponding to the flow.

Return type:

pandas.Series

Raises:

ImportError -- Multiple matching entries.

get_primary_key()¶

Get primary key of the database.

Returns:

Primary key organizing the database.

Return type:

str

get_unit_key()¶

Get unit key of the database.

Returns:

Data header corresponding to the units of the database entries.

Return type:

str

get_qty_key()¶

Get quantity key of the database.

Returns:

Data header corresponding to the quantity of the database entries.

Return type:

str

get_density_key()¶

Get the density key of the database.

Returns:

Data header corresponding to the density of the database entries.

Return type:

str

get_density_unit_key()¶

Get the density unit key of the database.

Returns:

Data header corresponding to the unit of density of the database entries.

Return type:

str

get_required_headers()¶

Get the required headers of the database.

Returns:

Headers of the columns to be imported, other than name, unit, and impact categories.

Return type:

list of str

class pod_lca.impacts.ElectricityImpactsDatabase¶

Bases: ImpactsDatabase

Database manager to handle electricity impacts.

process_key¶

Data header corresponding to the end-of-life process corresponding to the database entry.

Type:

str

life_cycle_stage_key¶

Data header corresponding to the life cycle stage corresponding to the database entry.

Type:

str

classmethod new(name, geographical_scope=None)¶

Create a new database.

Parameters:

  • name (str) -- Name of the database.

  • file_path (str) -- Location of the impact categories json file.

  • geographical_scope ({'National', 'Regional', 'Local'}) -- Geographical scope of the database.

Returns:

Database created.

Return type:

ElectricityImpactsDatabase

Raises:

ValueError -- If geographical scope is not one of the options given.

set_region_key(key)¶

Set region key of the database.

Parameters:

key (str) -- Data header corresponding to the end-of-life process corresponding to the database entry.

set_technology_key(key)¶

Set technology key of the database.

Parameters:

key (str) -- Data header corresponding to the end-of-life process corresponding to the database entry.

get_region_key()¶

Get region key of the database.

Returns:

Data header corresponding to the end-of-life process corresponding to the database entry.

Return type:

str

get_technology_key()¶

Get technology key of the database.

Returns:

Data header corresponding to the end-of-life process corresponding to the database entry.

Return type:

str

get_required_headers()¶

Get the required headers of the database.

Returns:

Headers of the database.

Return type:

list of str

get_data_entry(region, technology)¶

Retrieve impacts for given flow.

Parameters:

  • region (str) -- Electricity generation region, as appropriate to the regionality used.

  • technology (str) -- Electricity generation technology.

Returns:

Databse entry corresponding to the flow.

Return type:

pandas.Series

class pod_lca.impacts.EOLImpactsDatabase¶

Bases: ImpactsDatabase

Database manager to handle End-of-Life impacts.

process_key¶

Data header corresponding to the end-of-life pathway corresponding to the database entry.

Type:

str

life_cycle_stage_key¶

Data header corresponding to the life cycle stage corresponding to the database entry.

Type:

str

classmethod new(name)¶

Create a new database.

Parameters:

name (str) -- Name of the database.

Returns:

Database created.

Return type:

EOLImpactsDatabase

set_process_key(key)¶

Set process key of the database.

Parameters:

key (str) -- Data header corresponding to the end-of-life pathway corresponding to the database entry.

set_life_cycle_stage_key(key)¶

Set life cycle stage key of the database.

Parameters:

key (str) -- Data header corresponding to the life cycle stage corresponding to the database entry.

get_process_key()¶

Get process key of the database.

Returns:

Data header corresponding to the end-of-life process corresponding to the database entry.

Return type:

str

get_life_cycle_stage_key()¶

Get life cycle stage key of the database.

Returns:

Data header corresponding to the life cycle stage corresponding to the database entry.

Return type:

str

get_required_headers()¶

Get the required headers of the database.

Returns:

Database headers.

Return type:

list of str

get_data_entry(material_name, process_name, life_cycle_stage)¶

Retrieve impacts for given flow.

Parameters:

  • material_name (str) -- Name of the material

  • process_name ({'Landfill', 'Recycle', 'Compost', 'Incinerate'}) --

    End-of-life pathway:

    • 'Landfill': transporting waste to a landfill.

    • 'Recycle': transporting waste to a recycler.

    • 'Compost': transporting to a composting facility.

    • 'Incinerate': transporting to an incinerator.

  • life_cycle_stage ({'C3', 'C4', 'D'}) --

    Life cycle stage.

    • 'C3': waste processing

    • 'C4': disposal

    • 'D': reuse

Returns:

Databse entry corresponding to the flow.

Return type:

pandas.Series

Raises:

ImportError -- Data not in database or multiple matching entries.

class pod_lca.impacts.TranportationModeImpactsDatabase¶

Bases: ImpactsDatabase

Database manager to handle End-of-Life impacts.

fuel_type_key¶

Data header corresponding to the fuel type corresponding to the database entry.

Type:

str

mode_efficiency_key¶

Data header corresponding to the mode efficiency corresponding to the database entry.

Type:

str

classmethod new(name)¶

Create a new database.

Parameters:

name (str) -- Name of the database.

Returns:

Database created.

Return type:

ImpactsDatabase

set_mode_efficiency_key(key)¶

Set the mode efficiency key of the database.

Parameters:

key (str) -- Data header corresponding to the mode efficiency corresponding to the database entry.

get_mode_efficiency_key()¶

Get the mode efficiency key of the database.

Returns:

Data header corresponding to the mode efficiency corresponding to the database entry.

Return type:

str

get_required_headers()¶

Get the required headers of the database.

Returns:

Database headers.

Return type:

list of str

get_data_entry(mode)¶

Retrieve impacts for given flow.

Parameters:

mode (TransportMode) -- Transport mode with its name, fuel type, and efficiency.

Returns:

Databse entry corresponding to the flow.

Return type:

pandas.Series
